reviews.comment:
Pelos en la cama, mala atencion en el resto, me cobraron 650 sin ser socio de a.c.a, y al siguiente le mintieron q ese era el precio con descuento! Mala onda.

(Translated by Google)
Hair on the bed, bad service elsewhere, they charged me 650 without being an ACA member, and then they lied to the next person, saying that was the discounted price! Bad vibes.
